# Shield.io badge candidates — Forge anvil + Java coffee cup base64 logos

## Candidate 1 — `for-the-badge`, brand color bg, white logo

```markdown
[![Forge 1.20.1](https://img.shields.io/badge/Forge-1.20.1-FF6600?style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,)](https://files.minecraftforge.net)
[![Java 17](https://img.shields.io/badge/Java-17-ED8B00?style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,)](https://adoptium.net)
```

[![Forge 1.20.1](https://img.shields.io/badge/Forge-1.20.1-FF6600?style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,)](https://files.minecraftforge.net)
[![Java 17](https://img.shields.io/badge/Java-17-ED8B00?style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,)](https://adoptium.net)

## Candidate 5 — `for-the-badge`, black `#181717` label, brand color value + logo

```markdown
[![Forge 1.20.1](https://img.shields.io/badge/Forge-1.20.1-FF6600?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=181717&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,)](https://files.minecraftforge.net)
```

## Summary

| # | Style | Forge label | Forge value | Java label | Java value | Logo color |
|---|-------|------------|------------|-----------|-----------|-----------|
| 1 | `for-the-badge` | Orange `#FF6600` | Orange `#FF6600` | Java orange `#ED8B00` | Java orange `#ED8B00` | White on brand |
| 2 | `for-the-badge` | White `#ffffff` | Dark `#181717` | White `#ffffff` | Dark `#181717` | Brand color on white |
| 3 | `flat-square` | Orange `#FF6600` | Orange `#FF6600` | Java orange `#ED8B00` | Java orange `#ED8B00` | White, compact |
| 4 | `plastic` | Orange `#FF6600` | Dark `#181717` | Java orange `#ED8B00` | Dark `#181717` | White, glossy |
| 5 | `for-the-badge` | Dark `#181717` | Orange `#FF6600` | Dark `#181717` | Java orange `#ED8B00` | White on black |
